diagram_title: Route Model Requests to LLM Providers
purpose: Resolve which LLM model and provider endpoint to use for a given request, attach auth, apply circuit breaker health checks, and execute the API call

activities.name: List Available Models
activities.description: Call models.list RPC; result filtered by subscription plan, feature flags, and policy state

activities.name: Select Model for Request
activities.description: Apply model picker categories (lightweight/versatile/powerful) and default model flags (copilot_cli_opus_1m_default_model, copilot_cli_gpt_default_model) to choose target model

activities.name: Resolve Provider Endpoint
activities.description: Map model ID to provider URL: api.githubcopilot.com for standard models, BYOK baseUrl for custom providers, api.anthropic.com for direct Anthropic routing

activities.name: Attach Auth Headers
activities.description: Add Bearer capiSessionToken plus copilot-specific headers: Openai-Intent, x-initiator, Copilot-Vision-Request, x-request-id

activities.name: Apply Circuit Breaker
activities.description: Check provider health state (CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN); block request if OPEN, send probe if HALF_OPEN. Threshold: 5 consecutive failures opens circuit, 30s timeout before half-open probe

activities.name: Execute LLM API Call
activities.description: Send request to resolved endpoint; handle streaming response (SSE chunks), timeout, and error classification for circuit breaker feedback

arrows.label: Feature flags + subscription tier (from idef0.01 A3)
Provider registry (standard, BYOK, direct Anthropic mappings)
Circuit breaker state (failure count, last failure time)
Approved request (circuit CLOSED or HALF_OPEN probe)
Request outcome (success/failure) feeds circuit breaker state
